{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "OAP / Newscaster",
  "description": "Glow FM Akure is a vibrant and popular radio station broadcasting from the heart of Akure, Ondo State, Nigeria. With a frequency of 99.1 FM, the station has become a household name in the region, entertaining and informing a wide audience of listeners.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: OAP / Newscaster

Job Location:&nbsp;Akure, Ondo
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are seeking talented, disciplined, and passionate individuals to join our broadcast team as OAP/Newscaster.
	The ideal candidate must have a strong voice, good command of language, confidence on air, creativity, and the ability to present news, programmes, interviews, and audience-focused content professionally.
	This role is suitable for someone who understands the responsibility of broadcasting, can communicate clearly, and is ready to contribute to the growth of a modern radio station across both on-air and digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Present radio programmes in a professional, engaging, and listener-friendly manner.
	Read and interpret news bulletins clearly and accurately.
	Prepare scripts, programme notes, interview questions, and show outlines.
	Conduct interviews, moderate discussions, and engage guests professionally.
	Work with the news, production, and digital teams to create quality content.
	Support live broadcasts, special programmes, and station events when required.
	Engage listeners across radio and digital platforms.
	Maintain professional conduct, punctuality, and brand consistency on and off air.


Requirements


	Good command of English language.
	Ability to speak Yoruba fluently is an added advantage.
	Clear voice, good pronunciation, and strong communication skills.
	Ability to write, edit, and present news or programme scripts.
	Previous radio, media, journalism, or public speaking experience is an advantage.
	Must be creative, disciplined, punctual, teachable, and confident.
	Must be comfortable with live presentation and audience engagement.


Benefits


	Opportunity to work with a growing broadcast and digital media brand.
	Practical exposure to radio presentation, news delivery, interviews, and live programming.
	Supportive work environment for learning and professional growth.
	Opportunity to build a strong personal media brand.
	Access to radio, digital media, and content production experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;dokita2010@gmail.com&nbsp;&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;Applicants must include a 1&ndash;3 minute voice demo link in the Portfolio URL field or mention the link in their cover letter.",

OAP / Newscaster Job at Glow FM




        
    

        
        Glow FM Akure is a vibrant and popular radio station broadcasting from the heart of Akure, Ondo State, Nigeria. With a frequency of 99.1 FM, the station has become a household name in the region, entertaining and informing a wide audience of listeners.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: OAP / Newscaster

Job Location: Akure, Ondo
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking talented, disciplined, and passionate individuals to join our broadcast team as OAP/Newscaster.
	The ideal candidate must have a strong voice, good command of language, confidence on air, creativity, and the ability to present news, programmes, interviews, and audience-focused content professionally.
	This role is suitable for someone who understands the responsibility of broadcasting, can communicate clearly, and is ready to contribute to the growth of a modern radio station across both on-air and digital platforms.


Key Responsibilities


	Present radio programmes in a professional, engaging, and listener-friendly manner.
	Read and interpret news bulletins clearly and accurately.
	Prepare scripts, programme notes, interview questions, and show outlines.
	Conduct interviews, moderate discussions, and engage guests professionally.
	Work with the news, production, and digital teams to create quality content.
	Support live broadcasts, special programmes, and station events when required.
	Engage listeners across radio and digital platforms.
	Maintain professional conduct, punctuality, and brand consistency on and off air.


Requirements


	Good command of English language.
	Ability to speak Yoruba fluently is an added advantage.
	Clear voice, good pronunciation, and strong communication skills.
	Ability to write, edit, and present news or programme scripts.
	Previous radio, media, journalism, or public speaking experience is an advantage.
	Must be creative, disciplined, punctual, teachable, and confident.
	Must be comfortable with live presentation and audience engagement.


Benefits


	Opportunity to work with a growing broadcast and digital media brand.
	Practical exposure to radio presentation, news delivery, interviews, and live programming.
	Supportive work environment for learning and professional growth.
	Opportunity to build a strong personal media brand.
	Access to radio, digital media, and content production experience.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected]  using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Applicants must include a 1–3 minute voice demo link in the Portfolio URL field or mention the link in their cover letter.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Female School Receptionist",
  "description": "MBIS International is a growing nursery and primary school delivering the British Curriculum. The school is committed to maintaining high standards of teaching, learning and pupil achievement.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position:&nbsp;Female School Receptionist

Job Location:&nbsp;Jericho, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Description


	We are a well-established Nursery and Primary School recognised for our commitment to academic excellence, strong values, and a warm, professional learning environment.
	Our front office plays a vital role in shaping the daily experience of pupils, parents, and visitors. We are therefore seeking a highly organised, polished, and dependable Female School Receptionist to manage our reception with professionalism, warmth, and efficiency.
	The successful candidate will serve as the first point of contact for the school community, ensuring that every interaction reflects our high standards of organisation, courtesy, and care. This role requires a proactive individual who can maintain a calm and welcoming presence within a busy school environment.


Key Responsibilities
Reception &amp; Front Office:


	Welcome pupils, parents, staff, and visitors in a warm, courteous, and professional manner
	Serve as the first point of contact for all enquiries (in person, by phone, and via email)
	Ensure all visitors comply with sign-in procedures in line with safeguarding requirements
	Direct enquiries appropriately and provide clear, accurate information on school procedures
	Maintain a calm, organised, and professional reception environment at all times


Attendance &amp; Record Keeping:


	Accurately record daily pupil attendance
	Follow up on unexplained absences in accordance with school procedures
	Maintain records of late arrivals and early departures
	Ensure all attendance data and related records remain accurate and up to date


Administrative Support:


	Provide general administrative support, including printing, photocopying, and laminating
	Maintain clear and legible records where necessary
	Take meeting notes and prepare well-structured minutes as needed
	Prepare and submit daily front office reports


Parent &amp; Pupil Support:


	Respond to parent enquiries in a courteous, helpful, and professional manner
	Provide basic support to pupils with minor concerns (e.g. lost items)


Admissions &amp; Enquiries:


	Act as the first point of contact for prospective parents
	Provide clear and professional information on the school&rsquo;s programmes and admissions process
	Record and maintain accurate details of all enquiries (phone, email, and walk-in)
	Schedule school visits and appointments as required
	Liaise with relevant staff to ensure timely follow-up on all enquiries


School Calendar, Events &amp; Community Engagement:


	Support the maintenance and updating of the school&rsquo;s events calendar, ensuring all key dates and activities are accurately recorded and communicated
	Maintain records of pupils&rsquo; birthdays and assist in coordinating appropriate in-school acknowledgements in line with the school&rsquo;s culture
	Provide front office and administrative support for school events, including Open Days and Parent Information Sessions
	Assist in preparing the reception area to reflect the school&rsquo;s high standards during events and special occasions
	Communicate upcoming events and key dates to staff and, where appropriate, to parents


Reception Environment:


	Ensure notice boards are current, accurate, and professionally presented
	Maintain a tidy, welcoming, and well-organised front office environment at all times


Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree (minimum of Second Class Lower) in Administration, Management, Communications, or a related field


Experience:


	Minimum of three (3) years of continuous post-NYSC experience in&nbsp;school administrative office, or a&nbsp;front-facing administrative role within a structured professional environment
	Relevant sectors include:
	
		Schools
		Corporate offices
		Professional service organisations
	
	
	Experience limited to remote or virtual roles will not be considered.
	Candidates must demonstrate experience working within structured administrative systems, record-keeping processes, and professional office standards.


Key Skills &amp; Qualities:


	Professional Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Organisation &amp; Attention to Detail: Strong ability to manage multiple responsibilities accurately
	Clear Handwriting: High standard required for maintaining official records
	Digital Competence: Proficiency in Microsoft Office and basic administrative systems
	Professional Presence: Well presented, courteous, discreet, and composed at all times
	Reliability &amp; Initiative: Able to take initiative and ensure smooth day-to-day operations


Salary
N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to:&nbsp;eyfsrecruitment@gmail.com&nbsp;using &quot;Application &ndash; Female School Receptionist &ndash; Jericho&quot;&nbsp;as the subject of the mail.

Send the following documents to:


	Your CV
	A one-page handwritten statement (scanned) explaining why you are suitable for the role
	A full-length photograph
	In your application email, clearly state the organisation where you gained your three years of post-NYSC experience.


Application Notice


	Due to the structured nature of this role, only candidates whose experience clearly matches the stated requirements will be contacted.
	Applicants are strongly advised to review the criteria carefully before applying.
	Applicants must reside in Ibadan and be able to commute easily to Jericho.
",

Female School Receptionist Job at MBIS International




        
    

        
        MBIS International is a growing nursery and primary school delivering the British Curriculum. The school is committed to maintaining high standards of teaching, learning and pupil achievement.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Female School Receptionist

Job Location: Jericho, Ibadan - Oyo
Employment Type: Full-time

Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are a well-established Nursery and Primary School recognised for our commitment to academic excellence, strong values, and a warm, professional learning environment.
	Our front office plays a vital role in shaping the daily experience of pupils, parents, and visitors. We are therefore seeking a highly organised, polished, and dependable Female School Receptionist to manage our reception with professionalism, warmth, and efficiency.
	The successful candidate will serve as the first point of contact for the school community, ensuring that every interaction reflects our high standards of organisation, courtesy, and care. This role requires a proactive individual who can maintain a calm and welcoming presence within a busy school environment.


Key Responsibilities
Reception & Front Office:


	Welcome pupils, parents, staff, and visitors in a warm, courteous, and professional manner
	Serve as the first point of contact for all enquiries (in person, by phone, and via email)
	Ensure all visitors comply with sign-in procedures in line with safeguarding requirements
	Direct enquiries appropriately and provide clear, accurate information on school procedures
	Maintain a calm, organised, and professional reception environment at all times


Attendance & Record Keeping:


	Accurately record daily pupil attendance
	Follow up on unexplained absences in accordance with school procedures
	Maintain records of late arrivals and early departures
	Ensure all attendance data and related records remain accurate and up to date


Administrative Support:


	Provide general administrative support, including printing, photocopying, and laminating
	Maintain clear and legible records where necessary
	Take meeting notes and prepare well-structured minutes as needed
	Prepare and submit daily front office reports


Parent & Pupil Support:


	Respond to parent enquiries in a courteous, helpful, and professional manner
	Provide basic support to pupils with minor concerns (e.g. lost items)


Admissions & Enquiries:


	Act as the first point of contact for prospective parents
	Provide clear and professional information on the school’s programmes and admissions process
	Record and maintain accurate details of all enquiries (phone, email, and walk-in)
	Schedule school visits and appointments as required
	Liaise with relevant staff to ensure timely follow-up on all enquiries


School Calendar, Events & Community Engagement:


	Support the maintenance and updating of the school’s events calendar, ensuring all key dates and activities are accurately recorded and communicated
	Maintain records of pupils’ birthdays and assist in coordinating appropriate in-school acknowledgements in line with the school’s culture
	Provide front office and administrative support for school events, including Open Days and Parent Information Sessions
	Assist in preparing the reception area to reflect the school’s high standards during events and special occasions
	Communicate upcoming events and key dates to staff and, where appropriate, to parents


Reception Environment:


	Ensure notice boards are current, accurate, and professionally presented
	Maintain a tidy, welcoming, and well-organised front office environment at all times


Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor’s Degree (minimum of Second Class Lower) in Administration, Management, Communications, or a related field


Experience:


	Minimum of three (3) years of continuous post-NYSC experience in school administrative office, or a front-facing administrative role within a structured professional environment
	Relevant sectors include:
	
		Schools
		Corporate offices
		Professional service organisations
	
	
	Experience limited to remote or virtual roles will not be considered.
	Candidates must demonstrate experience working within structured administrative systems, record-keeping processes, and professional office standards.


Key Skills & Qualities:


	Professional Communication: Excellent written and verbal communication skills
	Organisation & Attention to Detail: Strong ability to manage multiple responsibilities accurately
	Clear Handwriting: High standard required for maintaining official records
	Digital Competence: Proficiency in Microsoft Office and basic administrative systems
	Professional Presence: Well presented, courteous, discreet, and composed at all times
	Reliability & Initiative: Able to take initiative and ensure smooth day-to-day operations


Salary
N150,000 monthly.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Application to: [email protected] using "Application – Female School Receptionist – Jericho" as the subject of the mail.

Send the following documents to:


	Your CV
	A one-page handwritten statement (scanned) explaining why you are suitable for the role
	A full-length photograph
	In your application email, clearly state the organisation where you gained your three years of post-NYSC experience.


Application Notice


	Due to the structured nature of this role, only candidates whose experience clearly matches the stated requirements will be contacted.
	Applicants are strongly advised to review the criteria carefully before applying.
	Applicants must reside in Ibadan and be able to commute easily to Jericho.
    

    

        Click here to Apply

  "title": "Backend Developer",
  "description": "Gate84 is a technology company building the digital infrastructure for a functional society. We aim to bridge the gap between real-world problems and technical solutions by creating a platform where verified experts can propose practical, peer-reviewed solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Backend Developer

Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Design, build, and maintain highly scalable backend services and distributed systems.
	Develop robust, low-latency APIs to seamlessly power our cross-platform mobile apps and web administrative dashboards.
	Integrate third-party APIs securely using their respective documentation.
	Design and optimize complex database schemas, ensuring the system can efficiently handle high read/write ratios.
	Write clean, high quality, high performance, and properly tested code.
	Collaborate with mobile and frontend teams, providing internal documentation for APIs.
	Monitor system health, identify performance bottlenecks, and resolve production issues to avoid downtime.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Computer Science or a related field
	3+ years of hands-on backend experience.
	Production experience using Golang, Node.js, Python, etc
	Deep knowledge on databases, caching, and deployments.


Benefits and opportunities


	Salary; N300,000 - N500,000 monthly.
	Monthly transport allowance
	HMO Coverage
	Gym membership
	Opportunity to grow and lead a team.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and links of their LinkedIn/portfolio/projects to:&nbsp;joel@gate84.io&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Backend Developer Job at Gate84




        
    

        
        Gate84 is a technology company building the digital infrastructure for a functional society. We aim to bridge the gap between real-world problems and technical solutions by creating a platform where verified experts can propose practical, peer-reviewed solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Backend Developer

Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Design, build, and maintain highly scalable backend services and distributed systems.
	Develop robust, low-latency APIs to seamlessly power our cross-platform mobile apps and web administrative dashboards.
	Integrate third-party APIs securely using their respective documentation.
	Design and optimize complex database schemas, ensuring the system can efficiently handle high read/write ratios.
	Write clean, high quality, high performance, and properly tested code.
	Collaborate with mobile and frontend teams, providing internal documentation for APIs.
	Monitor system health, identify performance bottlenecks, and resolve production issues to avoid downtime.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science or a related field
	3+ years of hands-on backend experience.
	Production experience using Golang, Node.js, Python, etc
	Deep knowledge on databases, caching, and deployments.


Benefits and opportunities


	Salary; N300,000 - N500,000 monthly.
	Monthly transport allowance
	HMO Coverage
	Gym membership
	Opportunity to grow and lead a team.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and links of their LinkedIn/portfolio/projects to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Product Manager",
  "description": "Gate84 is a technology company building the digital infrastructure for a functional society. We aim to bridge the gap between real-world problems and technical solutions by creating a platform where verified experts can propose practical, peer-reviewed solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Product Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The product manager will work with a cross-functional team of software developers, designers, etc to build the Gate84 social platform.


Responsibilities


	Define and own the product vision and strategy, aligning it with the broader business goals and objectives.
	Conduct user research and interviews with different user groups to identify their motivations, friction points and incentives. Use these insights to build a successful product.
	Lead the entire product lifecycle, taking the platform from initial wireframes and conceptualization all the way through development to a successful, high-impact public launch.
	Develop, prioritize, maintain and execute the product roadmap and backlog. Ensure the team remains laser-focused on building the exact features necessary to achieve Product-Market Fit.
	Implement viral mechanics and sustainable growth loops into the core product experience from day one, ensuring the application can organically acquire and retain users.
	Define and track success metrics. Use A/B testing, user insights, and quantitative analysis to drive decision-making.
	Collaborate with cross-functional team members to ensure a smooth product development. Align with stakeholders and keep them informed.


Requirements


	3+ years of experience in product management
	Experience going through the full product life cycle. From ideation to post-launch.
	Critical thinking, analytical and problem solving skills
	Strong organizational and execution skills.
	(Bonus) Possess knowledge of consumer marketing.


Benefits and opportunities


	Salary: N300,000 - N400,000 per month.
	Monthly transport allowance
	HMO Coverage
	Gym membership
	Opportunity to grow and lead a team.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and links of their LinkedIn/portfolio/projects to:&nbsp;joel@gate84.io&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Product Manager Job at Gate84




        
    

        
        Gate84 is a technology company building the digital infrastructure for a functional society. We aim to bridge the gap between real-world problems and technical solutions by creating a platform where verified experts can propose practical, peer-reviewed solutions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Product Manager
Job Location: Port Harcourt, Rivers
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The product manager will work with a cross-functional team of software developers, designers, etc to build the Gate84 social platform.


Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Define and own the product vision and strategy, aligning it with the broader business goals and objectives.
	Conduct user research and interviews with different user groups to identify their motivations, friction points and incentives. Use these insights to build a successful product.
	Lead the entire product lifecycle, taking the platform from initial wireframes and conceptualization all the way through development to a successful, high-impact public launch.
	Develop, prioritize, maintain and execute the product roadmap and backlog. Ensure the team remains laser-focused on building the exact features necessary to achieve Product-Market Fit.
	Implement viral mechanics and sustainable growth loops into the core product experience from day one, ensuring the application can organically acquire and retain users.
	Define and track success metrics. Use A/B testing, user insights, and quantitative analysis to drive decision-making.
	Collaborate with cross-functional team members to ensure a smooth product development. Align with stakeholders and keep them informed.


Requirements


	3+ years of experience in product management
	Experience going through the full product life cycle. From ideation to post-launch.
	Critical thinking, analytical and problem solving skills
	Strong organizational and execution skills.
	(Bonus) Possess knowledge of consumer marketing.


Benefits and opportunities


	Salary: N300,000 - N400,000 per month.
	Monthly transport allowance
	HMO Coverage
	Gym membership
	Opportunity to grow and lead a team.


Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV and links of their LinkedIn/portfolio/projects to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Assistant Administrative Manager",
  "description": "Otsuka Nigeria Nutraceutical Company (ONNC) is a fast moving FMCG, Nutraceutical, phamaceutical and chemical industry. located in sagamu, interchange, Ogun state Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Administrative Manager
Job Location:&nbsp;Sagamu-Interchange, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Support daily administrative operations within the factory and office
	Coordinate administrative support for production, engineering, and logistics teams
	Supervise admin staff (clerks, front desk, facility support)
	Manage office supplies, factory consumables, and vendor coordination
	Assist in maintaining staff records, attendance, and documentation
	Prepare reports related to operations, workforce, and administrative costs
	Coordinate meetings, internal communications, and schedules
	Ensure compliance with company policies, safety standards, and regulatory requirements
	Support audits, inspections, and internal control processes
	Assist in facility management (cleaning, security, utilities coordination)


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or related field
	5-10 years of experience in administration, preferably in a manufacturing or factory setting
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
	Ability to work in a fast-paced industrial environment
	Basic knowledge of factory operations is an advantage


Preferred Skills:


	Experience in FMCG or bottling/manufacturing companies
	Knowledge of HR processes (attendance, leave tracking, staff records)
	Familiarity with compliance, HSE, and audit processes
	Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.


Salary
N600,000 - N700,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;victor.ek@otsuka.ng&nbsp;using &ldquo;Application of Asst. Admin Manager&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Assistant Administrative Manager Job at Otsuka Nutraceutical Company Limited




        
    

        
        Otsuka Nigeria Nutraceutical Company (ONNC) is a fast moving FMCG, Nutraceutical, phamaceutical and chemical industry. located in sagamu, interchange, Ogun state Nigeria.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Administrative Manager
Job Location: Sagamu-Interchange, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Support daily administrative operations within the factory and office
	Coordinate administrative support for production, engineering, and logistics teams
	Supervise admin staff (clerks, front desk, facility support)
	Manage office supplies, factory consumables, and vendor coordination
	Assist in maintaining staff records, attendance, and documentation
	Prepare reports related to operations, workforce, and administrative costs
	Coordinate meetings, internal communications, and schedules
	Ensure compliance with company policies, safety standards, and regulatory requirements
	Support audits, inspections, and internal control processes
	Assist in facility management (cleaning, security, utilities coordination)


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or related field
	5-10 years of experience in administration, preferably in a manufacturing or factory setting
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Good communication and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office (Excel, Word, PowerPoint)
	Ability to work in a fast-paced industrial environment
	Basic knowledge of factory operations is an advantage


Preferred Skills:


	Experience in FMCG or bottling/manufacturing companies
	Knowledge of HR processes (attendance, leave tracking, staff records)
	Familiarity with compliance, HSE, and audit processes
	Strong attention to detail and problem-solving skills.


Salary
N600,000 - N700,000 per month.

Method of Application
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using “Application of Asst. Admin Manager" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply
